technology.title: Anthropic says US has lifted export controls on Fable and Mythos AI models after security fears
technology.summary: AI company was forced last month to suspend access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all foreign nationals Business live – latest updates Anthropic has restored customer access to its powerful newest AI model, Fable, after a more than two-week blackout resulting from US government safety concerns that it could be abused to enable serious cyber-attacks. The San Francisco company said export controls had been lifted, citing a social media post from the US commerce secretary, Howard Lutnick, in which he said: “Over the past two weeks, we have worked closely with Anthropic to analyze and approve Fable 5 to ensure alignment across the US Government and strengthen America’s leadership in AI.” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: AI company was forced last month to suspend access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all foreign nationals Business live – latest updates Anthropic has restored customer access to its powerful newest AI model, Fable, after a more than two-week blackout resulting from US government safety concerns that it could be abused to enable serious cyber-attacks. The San Francisco company said export controls had been lifted, citing a social media post from the US commerce secretary, Howard Lutnick, in which he said: “Over the past two weeks, we have worked closely with Anthropic to analyze and approve Fable 5 to ensure alignment across the US Government and strengthen America’s leadership in AI.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國政府已解除對Anthropic公司的Fable 5和Mythos 5人工智慧模型的出口管制，這一決定是在該公司因安全擔憂而暫停外國國籍用戶訪問這些模型後做出的。Anthropic表示，解除管制的過程中，與美國政府進行了密切合作，以確保這些模型的安全性和合規性，並強調美國在人工智慧領域的領導地位。
briefing.background: 在過去幾週，Anthropic因為擔心其AI模型可能被濫用以進行網絡攻擊而被迫暫停外國國籍用戶的訪問。這一事件反映了美國政府對於AI技術安全性的高度關注，尤其是在國際安全與競爭日益加劇的背景下。近期的政策變化顯示出美國政府在AI領域的監管策略正在調整，並試圖在促進技術創新與保障國家安全之間取得平衡。
briefing.analysis: 此次解除出口管制的決定顯示出美國政府在AI政策上的靈活性，尤其是在與Anthropic的合作中，強調了政府對於技術安全性的重視。不同於Wired報導中提到的特朗普政府的政策變化，TechCrunch則指出這種不穩定的政策可能使整個AI行業面臨不確定性。各方利益關係中，Anthropic希望能夠在全球市場上保持競爭力，而美國政府則需考量國家安全與技術領導權的平衡。未來，隨著AI技術的發展，相關的政策可能會持續調整，影響整個行業的運作模式。

supporting_titles: The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models
Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
supporting_summaries: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.
The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.

technology.title: Claude Helped a Hacker Find a Way to Issue Tickets to Almost Every US Music Festival
technology.summary: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.

briefing.news_focus: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一名研究人員利用Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.7，成功入侵了Front Gate網站，該網站是多個美國音樂節（如Lollapalooza和Bonnaroo）使用的票務平台。這位黑客能夠隨意發行任何他選擇的票，顯示出該系統的安全漏洞。
briefing.background: Front Gate是美國主要音樂節的票務平台，負責管理數百萬張門票的銷售與分發。隨著數位票務系統的普及，這些平台的安全性變得至關重要。近年來，針對票務系統的網路攻擊事件屢見不鮮，這不僅影響了音樂節的運營，也對消費者的信任造成了損害。Anthropic的Claude Opus 4.7是一款先進的人工智慧工具，能夠協助用戶進行各種任務，但其潛在的濫用風險也引發了廣泛的關注。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件突顯了人工智慧技術在網路安全領域的雙刃劍特性。雖然Claude Opus 4.7能夠協助研究人員進行創新，但其被用於非法活動的潛力也引發了業界的擔憂。Front Gate作為一個重要的票務平台，必須加強其安全措施，以防止類似事件再次發生。此外，這一事件可能促使其他票務平台重新評估其安全策略，並加強對於人工智慧技術的監管。未來，業界可能會看到更多針對這類安全漏洞的討論與立法行動，以保障消費者的權益。

technology.title: Singapore seizes US$42.4 million bungalow linked to Nvidia chip fraud
technology.summary: Singapore authorities have seized a so-called Good Class Bungalow (GCB) valued at around S$55 million (US$42.4 million) and around S$1 million (US$770,000) of funds in connection with a fraud conspiracy, the police said on Wednesday. The case has been linked to the movement of Nvidia chips in contravention of US export controls. GCBs are among the most prestigious type of housing in Singapore, with authorities imposing key planning constraints. It is understood that the seized GCB is located at...

briefing.news_focus: Singapore authorities have seized a so-called Good Class Bungalow (GCB) valued at around S$55 million (US$42.4 million) and around S$1 million (US$770,000) of funds in connection with a fraud conspiracy, the police said on Wednesday. The case has been linked to the movement of Nvidia chips in contravention of US export controls. GCBs are among the most prestigious type of housing in Singapore, with authorities imposing key planning constraints. It is understood that the seized GCB is located at...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 新加坡當局查獲一棟價值約5500萬新幣（4240萬美元）的優質別墅，並扣押約100萬新幣（770,000美元）的資金，與一起涉及Nvidia晶片的詐騙陰謀有關。警方指出，此案件涉及違反美國出口管制的行為，顯示出該事件的國際性與複雜性。
briefing.background: 新加坡的優質別墅（Good Class Bungalow, GCB）是該國最具聲望的住宅類型之一，受到嚴格的規劃限制。該事件的發生背景與Nvidia晶片的國際貿易有關，特別是在美國對某些高科技產品實施出口管制的情況下。隨著全球對半導體技術的需求增加，各國對於晶片的出口監管也變得愈加嚴格，這使得相關的違法行為風險上升。
briefing.analysis: 此次新加坡當局的行動顯示出對於違反出口管制行為的高度重視，尤其是在全球半導體供應鏈緊張的背景下。各方利益關係中，Nvidia作為主要晶片供應商，可能面臨更嚴格的監管壓力，進而影響其市場策略與供應鏈管理。同時，新加坡政府也顯示出其在打擊金融犯罪及維護國際貿易規範方面的決心。未來，若該案件進一步發展，可能會引發更多國際間對於科技產品出口的討論與規範調整，特別是在美國與亞洲市場之間的貿易關係上。

politics.title: Himalayan pass reopens as ‘goodwill’ gesture in China-India thaw
politics.summary: China and India resumed cross-border trade through the Lipulekh Pass in the Himalayas last week in the latest sign of a cautious rapprochement between the two countries. The reopening of the pass near the contested India-China-Nepal border after six years came shortly after Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi’s visit to New Delhi. It was described by analysts as a goodwill gesture from Beijing, but they warned that the long-standing border dispute and strategic rivalry would continue to weigh on...

briefing.news_focus: China and India resumed cross-border trade through the Lipulekh Pass in the Himalayas last week in the latest sign of a cautious rapprochement between the two countries. The reopening of the pass near the contested India-China-Nepal border after six years came shortly after Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi’s visit to New Delhi. It was described by analysts as a goodwill gesture from Beijing, but they warned that the long-standing border dispute and strategic rivalry would continue to weigh on...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國與印度於上週重新開放了位於喜馬拉雅山脈的Lipulekh通道，這是兩國在邊界爭端後的最新和解跡象。該通道在經歷六年的封閉後重新開放，正值中國外交部長王毅訪問新德里之後。分析人士將此舉視為北京的善意表示，但也警告長期的邊界爭端和戰略競爭仍將持續影響雙方關係。
briefing.background: Lipulekh通道位於印度、尼泊爾和中國的邊界附近，過去曾是重要的貿易路徑。然而，由於邊界爭端，該通道自2017年以來一直處於封閉狀態。中國與印度之間的關係因邊界衝突而緊張，雙方在經濟和軍事上均存在競爭。近期，中國外交部長的訪問被視為兩國關係改善的契機，顯示出雙方在經濟合作上的潛在意願，儘管根本的地緣政治矛盾仍然存在。
briefing.analysis: 此次通道的重新開放被視為中國對印度的一種善意姿態，可能旨在緩解雙方的緊張關係。然而，分析人士指出，儘管有這樣的善意舉措，長期的邊界爭端和戰略競爭仍然是雙方關係中的主要障礙。印度在此事件中可能會謹慎應對，因為其國內對中國的懷疑情緒依然強烈。此外，這一動作可能會影響到其他地區的地緣政治格局，特別是在南亞地區的經濟合作與安全問題上。未來，雙方如何在邊界問題上進行談判，將成為觀察兩國關係的重要指標。

politics.title: Pakistan accuses India of water ‘weaponisation’ over Indus treaty suspension
politics.summary: Islamabad has warned that any attempt by India to deprive Pakistan of its share of water under the Indus Waters Treaty would amount to the “weaponisation of water” and could have serious consequences for regional peace and security. Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar and other government officials made the remarks at an international seminar on the 1960 World Bank – brokered treaty, which governs the sharing of water from the Indus River system between the nuclear-armed neighbours. The treaty has come...

briefing.news_focus: Islamabad has warned that any attempt by India to deprive Pakistan of its share of water under the Indus Waters Treaty would amount to the “weaponisation of water” and could have serious consequences for regional peace and security. Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar and other government officials made the remarks at an international seminar on the 1960 World Bank – brokered treaty, which governs the sharing of water from the Indus River system between the nuclear-armed neighbours. The treaty has come...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 巴基斯坦指控印度對於印河水條約的暫停行為進行水資源的「武器化」，並警告這樣的行為將對地區和平與安全造成嚴重後果。巴基斯坦外交部長伊沙克·達爾及其他官員在一場國際研討會上發表了這些言論，該研討會聚焦於1960年由世界銀行調解的條約，該條約規範了兩個擁有核武器的鄰國之間的水資源分配。
briefing.background: 印河水條約於1960年簽署，旨在解決印度與巴基斯坦之間的水資源分配問題，特別是印河流域的水資源。該條約在兩國之間的水資源管理中扮演了重要角色，並被視為維持地區穩定的關鍵因素。隨著兩國關係的緊張，特別是在克什米爾問題上，水資源的使用與分配成為了新的爭議焦點。印度與巴基斯坦的水資源糾紛不僅影響兩國的關係，也對周邊地區的環境與經濟發展帶來挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 巴基斯坦對印度的指控反映了兩國在水資源管理上的深刻分歧。巴基斯坦擔心印度可能會利用水資源作為政治工具，這在過去的衝突中已經出現過類似情況。印度則可能認為，根據條約的規定，對水資源的控制是其合法權利。這一事件可能會加劇兩國之間的緊張局勢，並引發國際社會的關注。若印度繼續推進對水資源的控制，巴基斯坦可能會尋求國際支持以維護其權益，這可能導致更大範圍的外交衝突。

politics.title: ‘YMCA’ Village People singer Victor Willis dies at 74
politics.summary: Victor Willis, lead singer of the disco group Village People whose hit Y.M.C.A. became a fixture at rallies for US President Donald Trump, has died, his spouse said in a Facebook post on Wednesday. “It is with profound sadness that I must announce the death of my husband, VICTOR WILLIS. Victor passed away on Tuesday, June 30, 2026, as a result of a short, but aggressive illness,” the post on Willis’s official page said. The Texas-born musician, who was 74, was a co-founder of the Village People...

briefing.news_focus: Victor Willis, lead singer of the disco group Village People whose hit Y.M.C.A. became a fixture at rallies for US President Donald Trump, has died, his spouse said in a Facebook post on Wednesday. “It is with profound sadness that I must announce the death of my husband, VICTOR WILLIS. Victor passed away on Tuesday, June 30, 2026, as a result of a short, but aggressive illness,” the post on Willis’s official page said. The Texas-born musician, who was 74, was a co-founder of the Village People...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國迪斯可樂團體Village People的主唱Victor Willis於2026年6月30日因短期但急性疾病去世，享年74歲。其配偶在Facebook上發表公告，表達對其去世的深切哀悼。Willis是Village People的共同創辦人之一，該樂團的代表作《Y.M.C.A.》在美國總統唐納德·特朗普的集會上廣受歡迎。
briefing.background: Village People成立於1977年，以其獨特的音樂風格和舞台形象而聞名，尤其是《Y.M.C.A.》這首歌成為了流行文化的象徵。該樂團的音樂不僅在迪斯可時代風靡一時，還在後來的政治活動中被廣泛使用，特別是在特朗普的集會上，象徵著一種特定的社會和政治氛圍。Victor Willis作為主唱，不僅是樂團的音樂靈魂，更是其文化影響力的重要代表。
briefing.analysis: Victor Willis的去世對於Village People及其粉絲來說是一大損失，尤其是在當前政治氣候中，該樂團的音樂仍然在某些社會運動中被引用。Willis的音樂遺產可能會繼續影響未來的藝術家和社會運動，特別是在LGBTQ+社群中，他們常常將Village People視為自我表達和多樣性的象徵。隨著Willis的離世，未來可能會出現對於Village People音樂及其社會意義的重新評估，尤其是在當前的文化和政治討論中。

economy.title: U.S. removes four Indian companies from Russia-related sanctions list
economy.summary: The companies have been deleted from the Office of Foreign Assets Control's (OFAC) Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons (SDN) List

briefing.news_focus: The companies have been deleted from the Office of Foreign Assets Control's (OFAC) Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons (SDN) List
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國將四家印度公司從與俄羅斯相關的制裁名單中移除，這些公司原本被列入美國財政部外國資產控制辦公室（OFAC）的特別指定國民及被封鎖人士名單（SDN List）。此舉可能顯示出美國對於印度在俄烏衝突中的立場有所調整。
briefing.background: 美國對俄羅斯的制裁始於2014年，隨著俄烏衝突的加劇，制裁名單不斷擴大，涵蓋了多個國家和企業。印度在此背景下，雖然與美國保持良好關係，但也試圖在俄羅斯和西方之間保持平衡。印度的能源需求使其在與俄羅斯的經濟合作中扮演重要角色，因此美國的這一決定可能反映出對印度立場的理解與尊重。
briefing.analysis: 美國移除四家印度公司的制裁，可能是為了促進與印度的經濟合作，並減少對其在俄羅斯市場活動的干擾。這一行動可能有助於加強美印之間的戰略夥伴關係，特別是在面對中國崛起的背景下。然而，這也可能引發其他國家對美國制裁政策的質疑，特別是那些仍在制裁名單上的國家和企業。未來，若印度持續在俄羅斯市場上活動，美國可能需要進一步調整其制裁政策，以維持與印度的良好關係。

economy.title: Andy Burnham is about to have a crash course in hardcore geopolitics | Rafael Behr
economy.summary: The likely next prime minister would rather be in Warrington than Washington, but foreign policy will dominate his agenda more than he thinks If Andy Burnham is lucky, he will get some time to adjust to the pace of life as prime minister before dealing with his first international crisis. It won’t be long. Donald Trump is an engine of constant turmoil. Aftershocks from his recent military adventure in the Middle East will be felt for years. None of the declared war aims were achieved. The Iranian regime was not toppled. The terms agreed for a ceasefire promise Tehran more generous sanctions relief with fewer conditions than were imposed under the nuclear containment deal that Barack Obama signed in 2015. It is a worse arrangement than the one Trump discarded in his first term as “one of the worst deals ever”. Stocks of US munitions and credibility have been drained. Rafael Behr is a Guardian columnist Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The likely next prime minister would rather be in Warrington than Washington, but foreign policy will dominate his agenda more than he thinks If Andy Burnham is lucky, he will get some time to adjust to the pace of life as prime minister before dealing with his first international crisis. It won’t be long. Donald Trump is an engine of constant turmoil. Aftershocks from his recent military adventure in the Middle East will be felt for years. None of the declared war aims were achieved. The Iranian regime was not toppled. The terms agreed for a ceasefire promise Tehran more generous sanctions relief with fewer conditions than were imposed under the nuclear containment deal that Barack Obama signed in 2015. It is a worse arrangement than the one Trump discarded in his first term as “one of the worst deals ever”. Stocks of US munitions and credibility have been drained. Rafael Behr is a Guardian columnist Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 安迪·伯納姆（Andy Burnham）可能成為英國下一任首相，但他將面臨一系列國際政策挑戰，尤其是因唐納德·特朗普（Donald Trump）在中東的軍事行動所引發的後果。這些行動未能實現預期的戰爭目標，伊朗政權依然穩固，且新達成的停火協議對伊朗的制裁條件較之前更為寬鬆。伯納姆可能希望在擔任首相前能有時間適應，但國際危機將很快來臨。
briefing.background: 唐納德·特朗普在其任內對中東的軍事行動引發了持續的地緣政治緊張，尤其是對伊朗的政策轉變。特朗普曾批評奧巴馬簽署的核協議，並在其任期內選擇退出，導致當前的局勢更為複雜。新達成的停火協議雖然暫時緩解了衝突，但卻未能有效解決根本問題，並可能使未來的核談判面臨更大挑戰。伯納姆作為新首相，將不得不在這一背景下制定其外交政策。
briefing.analysis: 安迪·伯納姆的外交政策將面臨多重挑戰，尤其是如何應對特朗普留下的地緣政治混亂。特朗普的軍事行動未能達成預期的效果，這使得伯納姆在國際舞台上需要迅速調整策略。參考報導提到的伊朗核協議問題，顯示出未來談判的困難，因為現有的協議條件較之前更為寬鬆，可能使得伊朗在國際社會中的地位更加鞏固。伯納姆若不迅速應對，可能會面臨國內外的壓力，影響其執政初期的穩定性。

supporting_titles: China wants more robots but not fewer workers
Why the last Iran nuclear deal still threatens the next one

economy.title: UK house prices flat in June, says Nationwide; higher energy bills cap kicks in – business live
economy.summary: Annual house price growth accelerates to 2.2%, led by Northern Ireland; analysts say housing market remains weak, but falling mortgage rates pave way for recovery UK manufacturing activity cooled in June despite a boost from ⁠companies stockpiling ahead of price increases and supply chain problems stemming from the Middle East conflict, according to closely ⁠watched industry survey. The final reading of S&P Global’s purchasing managers’ index for June fell to 52.5, ⁠below a preliminary estimate of 53.1, and May’s reading of 53.9. Readings above 50 indicate an expansion in activity. The UK ‌manufacturing sector ended the second quarter of the year on a positive note. Sustaining the upturn is becoming a bigger concern. Manufacturers are currently benefiting from client strategic stockpiling, as they safeguard against supply chain ‌disruptions and expected price rises. A drop in the rate of growth of new work intakes suggests this boost ​is already starting to fade. A further rise in manufacturing output in June adds to signs of encouraging resilience in the eurozone economy. June’s expansion in fact rounds off the strongest calendar quarter for euro area manufacturing production since the opening months of 2022, and will offset the recent decline that’s been recorded in the services economy. This sustained growth was accompanied by a welcome cooling of cost pressures, largely reflecting the sharp drop in oil prices seen during the month, alongside an easing of supply worries. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Annual house price growth accelerates to 2.2%, led by Northern Ireland; analysts say housing market remains weak, but falling mortgage rates pave way for recovery UK manufacturing activity cooled in June despite a boost from ⁠companies stockpiling ahead of price increases and supply chain problems stemming from the Middle East conflict, according to closely ⁠watched industry survey. The final reading of S&P Global’s purchasing managers’ index for June fell to 52.5, ⁠below a preliminary estimate of 53.1, and May’s reading of 53.9. Readings above 50 indicate an expansion in activity. The UK ‌manufacturing sector ended the second quarter of the year on a positive note. Sustaining the upturn is becoming a bigger concern. Manufacturers are currently benefiting from client strategic stockpiling, as they safeguard against supply chain ‌disruptions and expected price rises. A drop in the rate of growth of new work intakes suggests this boost ​is already starting to fade. A further rise in manufacturing output in June adds to signs of encouraging resilience in the eurozone economy. June’s expansion in fact rounds off the strongest calendar quarter for euro area manufacturing production since the opening months of 2022, and will offset the recent decline that’s been recorded in the services economy. This sustained growth was accompanied by a welcome cooling of cost pressures, largely reflecting the sharp drop in oil prices seen during the month, alongside an easing of supply worries. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國的房價在6月保持平穩，年增率達到2.2%，主要由北愛爾蘭推動。儘管分析師認為房市仍然疲弱，但隨著抵押貸款利率的下降，市場復甦的可能性增加。同時，英國製造業活動在6月有所降溫，S&P Global的採購經理人指數最終讀數為52.5，顯示出增長的放緩。製造商正因應供應鏈問題與價格上漲而進行庫存積累，這一策略的有效性正受到考驗。
briefing.background: 英國的房地產市場在過去幾年受到多重因素影響，包括利率上升和能源價格的波動。隨著抵押貸款利率的下降，市場復甦的希望逐漸增強。根據最新數據，北愛爾蘭的房價增長表現突出，顯示出地區間的差異。此外，英國的製造業在面對全球供應鏈挑戰和價格上漲的背景下，仍然顯示出一定的韌性，儘管最新的數據顯示增長勢頭正在減弱。
briefing.analysis: 房價的年增率雖然上升，但市場整體仍顯示出疲弱的跡象，這可能與高能源成本有關。根據BBC的報導，英國的家庭能源帳單在7月1日根據Ofgem的新能源上限上升了13%。這一變化可能會進一步壓縮家庭的可支配收入，影響消費者的購房能力。製造業的降溫也反映了市場的不確定性，儘管短期內庫存積累可能提供支持，但長期的增長可持續性仍然令人擔憂。隨著供應鏈問題的持續，製造商面臨的挑戰可能會影響整體經濟復甦的進程。

supporting_titles: What will the energy cap changes mean for my bills?
supporting_summaries: Typical annual household bills rose by 13% under Ofgem's new energy cap which took effect on 1 July.
